name: statesideseattle.com
message: Stateside Entertainment started when the Georgia Entertainment Industry Investment Act was signed into law August of 2008. This act boosts state tax credits for qualified production and post-production expenditures to 30%. Stateside takes those credits, monetizes them and delivers the tax benefits to the investor- the client. What does that mean to you? The production companies spend money in our Georgia market, Stateside buys their tax credits, and sells them to the public to reduce their tax liabilities. Its a win-win proposition that takes the guess work out of the equations for the studios, taxpayers, and CPA's.  Total Files Listed: 41097 File(s) 64,966,893,469 bytes 13528 Dir(s)  2,112,801,775,616 bytes free
